# Repo assets

Branding/marketing images referenced by the root README live here.

- `logo.png` — square app logo (optional; the README currently uses the Home
  orb at `resources/app-icons/light-theme/home_orb.jpeg` as an interim logo).
- `hero.png` / `hero.gif` — optional wide hero banner for the top of the README.

Keep these reasonably sized so the README loads fast.
